title: OCAI Culture Assessment Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the OCAI Culture Assessment skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

ocai_survey_administered.description: OCAI survey administered to the target population with confirmed anonymity and a minimum response rate target of 60%

organizational_segmentation_data.description: Organizational segmentation data to enable analysis by level, function, business unit, or geography

strategic_context_document.description: Strategic context document describing the organization's current priorities and the specific performance challenges motivating the culture assessment

leadership.description: Leadership-defined desired culture profile or, if not yet defined, a facilitated session to produce one using the same OCAI instrument

prior_ocai_results.description: Prior OCAI results for longitudinal comparison of culture profile movement over time

industry_sector_benchmarks.description: Industry or sector benchmarks for OCAI quadrant scores to contextualize findings against peer organizations

qualitative_interview_data.description: Qualitative interview data to enrich interpretation of the quantitative quadrant profiles
